name: button
title: Button
description: Primary actions with variants, text sizes, icon sizes, and a plain icon-only style.

api.description: Primary actions with variants, text and icon sizes, optional leading or trailing content, loading state, and a corner count badge. plain is the icon-only variant with no resting plate. Use glyphShadow to control the plain icon drop shadow on busy surfaces.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style of the button. plain is icon-only chrome with no resting plate; hover and focus expand a soft pad around the glyph without shifting layout. Use ghost for labeled transparent actions on UI chrome. Prefer plain on media, gradients, and dense overlays. Give plain buttons an aria-label.

props.name: size
props.description: Text sizes use padding (xs to 2xl). Icon sizes are square controls (icon-2xs to icon-2xl). plain requires an icon size; the resting box matches the glyph for that step. If plain is paired with a text size, size falls back to icon-xs.

props.name: underline
props.description: Link variant only. When true, show underline on hover. Set false to keep the label plain on hover.

props.name: glyphShadow
props.description: Plain icon only. When true, apply the glyph drop shadow to the icon so light glyphs stay readable on busy surfaces such as media and gradients. Set false to turn the shadow off (data-glyph-shadow=off). Customize the filter with --df-button-plain-glyph-filter when the shadow is on. Ignored on non-plain variants.

props.name: leading
props.description: Content before the label, such as an icon.

props.name: trailing
props.description: Content after the label, such as an icon or badge.

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a Spinner in the icon area, keeps the label, and disables the control. Unsupported on the link variant. Supported on plain icon sizes.

props.name: loadingPlacement
props.description: Which icon slot shows the Spinner while loading. Ignored for icon-only sizes, which replace the icon child.

props.name: loadingAppearance
props.description: muted fades the whole control like disabled. solid keeps the default background, fades the label only, and leaves the Spinner at full opacity.

props.name: badge
props.description: Corner count badge anchored to the top end of the button. Count ink is optically centered to cap height with text-box when available, and a 1cap line box otherwise. Hidden when empty, null, or 0. Include the count in aria-label for icon buttons.

props.name: badgeVariant
props.description: Badge visual style. Defaults to secondary on the default button variant, otherwise default, so the count stays readable on dark fills.

props.name: badgePosition
props.description: edge sits on the corner. inset pulls the badge a notch inside the button.

props.name: badgeSide
props.description: Which top corner hosts the badge. end is the trailing side (right in left to right layouts). start is the leading side.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the button.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles.

props.name: …button attributes
props.description: Native button props (type, onClick, aria-label, etc.).

groups.title: Helpers
groups.description: Class helper for applying button styles to a host that is not a button.

props.name: dfButtonClass
props.description: Builds the same class string Button uses internally. Resolves plain with a non-icon size to icon-xs, matching Button. For link hosts, set the underline data attribute to hover or none to match the underline prop. For plain icon hosts without glyph shadow, set data-glyph-shadow to off.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --spacing-unit
props.description: Base unit for padding, gap, and icon button size.

props.name: --primary
props.description: Default variant fill.

props.name: --primary-foreground
props.description: Default variant label.

props.name: --secondary
props.description: Secondary variant fill.

props.name: --secondary-foreground
props.description: Secondary variant label.

props.name: --destructive
props.description: Destructive variant fill.

props.name: --border
props.description: Outline variant border.

props.name: --muted
props.description: Ghost variant hover fill.

props.name: --ring
props.description: Focus ring color.

props.name: --df-button-plain-hover-outset
props.description: How far the plain icon hover pad expands beyond the glyph.

props.name: --df-button-plain-hover-fill
props.description: Plain icon hover pad fill.

props.name: --df-button-plain-hover-radius
props.description: Corner radius of the plain icon hover pad.

props.name: --df-button-plain-glyph-filter
props.description: Glyph elevation for plain icons when glyphShadow is true. Set glyphShadow to false to disable without changing this token.

props.name: --df-affordance-size-2xs
props.description: Glyph size for icon-2xs and plain icon-2xs.

props.name: --df-press-offset
props.description: Active press translate distance.

props.name: --df-underline-offset
props.description: Link variant underline offset.

props.name: --radius-4xl
props.description: Default corner radius.

props.name: --df-button-badge-size
props.description: Corner badge height and minimum width.

props.name: --df-button-badge-pad-inline
props.description: Horizontal padding inside the corner badge for longer counts.

props.name: --df-button-badge-inset
props.description: Offset used when badgePosition is inset.

props.name: --z-raised
props.description: Stacking level for the corner badge.

props.name: --df-label-line-height
props.description: Line box for label flex centering. Defaults to --df-leading-none. When text-box is unavailable and the cap unit is supported, the kit sets this to 1cap so flex centering matches cap-height ink.

props.name: --df-corner-shape
props.description: Theme corner curve for all kit chrome. round = circular arcs; smooth = continuous squircle. Set with df-ui init --corner-shape, or override on :root. Default round.
